---
title: "Diagnóstico de Madurez de Impacto"
description: "Evalúe en 5 minutos el nivel de madurez del sistema de medición de impacto de su programa social."
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ============================================================
   DIAGNÓSTICO — ESTILOS
   ============================================================ */

.diag-wrapper {
  background: #0F172A;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 60px);
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
}

/* HERO */
.diag-hero {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0F172A 0%, #1E293B 60%, #0F2C2A 100%);
  padding: 4rem 1.5rem 3rem;
  text-align: center;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(13,148,136,0.2);
}

.diag-hero-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  background: rgba(13,148,136,0.15);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,148,136,0.4);
  color: #5EEAD4;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 0.35rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.diag-hero h1 {
  font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2.8rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #F8FAFC;
  line-height: 1.2;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
}

.diag-hero h1 span {
  color: #5EEAD4;
}

.diag-hero-sub {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: #94A3B8;
  max-width: 600px;
  margin: 0 auto 2rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.diag-meta {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 2rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.diag-meta-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  color: #94A3B8;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.diag-meta-icon {
  color: #0D9488;
  font-size: 1rem;
}

/* PROGRESS */
.diag-progress-wrap {
  background: #1E293B;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
  position: sticky;
  top: 60px;
  z-index: 10;
}

.diag-progress-inner {
  max-width: 700px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.diag-progress-label {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.diag-progress-text {
  color: #94A3B8;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.diag-progress-pct {
  color: #5EEAD4;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.diag-progress-bar {
  height: 4px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  border-radius: 2px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.diag-progress-fill {
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0D9488, #5EEAD4);
  border-radius: 2px;
  transition: width 0.4s ease;
}

/* STEP DOTS */
.diag-steps-dots {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  padding: 0.75rem 0 0;
}

.diag-dot {
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
  transition: all 0.3s;
}

.diag-dot.active {
  background: #0D9488;
  transform: scale(1.3);
}

.diag-dot.done {
  background: #5EEAD4;
}

/* QUIZ AREA */
.diag-quiz-area {
  max-width: 700px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem;
}

/* DIMENSION HEADER */
.diag-dim-header {
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.diag-dim-tag {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  background: rgba(13,148,136,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,148,136,0.3);
  color: #5EEAD4;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.75rem;
  border-radius: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.diag-dim-title {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #F8FAFC;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}

.diag-dim-desc {
  color: #94A3B8;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* QUESTION CARD */
.diag-question {
  background: #1E293B;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  border-radius: 0.75rem;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  transition: border-color 0.2s;
}

.diag-question.answered {
  border-color: rgba(13,148,136,0.4);
}

.diag-q-text {
  color: #E2E8F0;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.diag-q-num {
  color: #475569;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

/* OPTIONS */
.diag-options {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 0.5rem;
}

.diag-option {
  position: relative;
}

.diag-option input[type="radio"] {
  position: absolute;
  opacity: 0;
  width: 0;
  height: 0;
}

.diag-option label {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.25rem;
  padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem;
  border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  text-align: center;
}

.diag-option label:hover {
  border-color: rgba(13,148,136,0.4);
  background: rgba(13,148,136,0.06);
}

.diag-option input:checked + label {
  border-color: #0D9488;
  background: rgba(13,148,136,0.15);
}

.diag-opt-icon {
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.diag-opt-text {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #94A3B8;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.diag-option input:checked + label .diag-opt-text {
  color: #5EEAD4;
}

.diag-opt-score {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  color: #475569;
}

.diag-option input:checked + label .diag-opt-score {
  color: #0D9488;
}

/* COLOR per option */
.diag-option:nth-child(1) input:checked + label {
  border-color: #DC2626;
  background: rgba(220,38,38,0.1);
}
.diag-option:nth-child(1) input:checked + label .diag-opt-text {
  color: #FCA5A5;
}

.diag-option:nth-child(2) input:checked + label {
  border-color: #F59E0B;
  background: rgba(245,158,11,0.1);
}
.diag-option:nth-child(2) input:checked + label .diag-opt-text {
  color: #FDE68A;
}

.diag-option:nth-child(3) input:checked + label {
  border-color: #059669;
  background: rgba(5,150,105,0.1);
}
.diag-option:nth-child(3) input:checked + label .diag-opt-text {
  color: #6EE7B7;
}

/* NAV BUTTONS */
.diag-nav {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-top: 2rem;
  padding-top: 1.5rem;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}

.diag-btn-back {
  background: transparent;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
  color: #94A3B8;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  padding: 0.65rem 1.5rem;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}

.diag-btn-back:hover {
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
  color: #F8FAFC;
}

.diag-btn-next {
  background: #0D9488;
  border: none;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 0.75rem 2rem;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
}

.diag-btn-next:hover:not(:disabled) {
  background: #0F766E;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(13,148,136,0.3);
}

.diag-btn-next:disabled {
  background: #1E3A5F;
  color: #475569;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

.diag-btn-next.finish {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0D9488, #0891B2);
}

/* VALIDATION */
.diag-validation {
  text-align: center;
  color: #F59E0B;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
  display: none;
}

/* ============================================================
   RESULTS
   ============================================================ */

.diag-results {
  display: none;
  padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem;
  max-width: 800px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.diag-results-header {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}

.diag-results-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  background: rgba(13,148,136,0.15);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,148,136,0.4);
  color: #5EEAD4;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.diag-results h2 {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3.5vw, 2.2rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #F8FAFC;
  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.diag-results-sub {
  color: #94A3B8;
  font-size: 1rem;
  max-width: 500px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

/* LEVEL CARD */
.diag-level-card {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1E293B 0%, #1a3040 100%);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,148,136,0.3);
  border-radius: 1rem;
  padding: 2rem;
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.diag-level-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  height: 3px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0D9488, #5EEAD4);
}

.diag-level-num {
  font-size: 5rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

.diag-level-name {
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #F8FAFC;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.diag-level-desc {
  color: #94A3B8;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  max-width: 400px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.diag-score-total {
  margin-top: 1rem;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #475569;
}

.diag-score-total strong {
  color: #5EEAD4;
}

/* SEMÁFORO GRID */
.diag-semaforo {
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.diag-semaforo h3 {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #475569;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.diag-sem-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
  gap: 0.75rem;
}

@media (max-width: 600px) {
  .diag-sem-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

.diag-sem-cell {
  background: #1E293B;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  border-radius: 0.75rem;
  padding: 1rem 0.75rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.diag-sem-cell.green {
  border-color: rgba(5,150,105,0.5);
  background: rgba(5,150,105,0.08);
}

.diag-sem-cell.yellow {
  border-color: rgba(245,158,11,0.5);
  background: rgba(245,158,11,0.06);
}

.diag-sem-cell.red {
  border-color: rgba(220,38,38,0.5);
  background: rgba(220,38,38,0.06);
}

.diag-sem-icon {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  display: block;
}

.diag-sem-cell.green .diag-sem-icon { color: #34D399; }
.diag-sem-cell.yellow .diag-sem-icon { color: #FBBF24; }
.diag-sem-cell.red .diag-sem-icon { color: #F87171; }

.diag-sem-name {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #CBD5E1;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
  line-height: 1.3;
}

.diag-sem-score {
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.diag-sem-cell.green .diag-sem-score { color: #34D399; }
.diag-sem-cell.yellow .diag-sem-score { color: #FBBF24; }
.diag-sem-cell.red .diag-sem-score { color: #F87171; }

.diag-sem-label {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  color: #475569;
  margin-top: 0.2rem;
}

/* RECOMMENDATION */
.diag-rec {
  background: #1E293B;
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,148,136,0.25);
  border-left: 4px solid #0D9488;
  border-radius: 0.75rem;
  padding: 1.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.diag-rec-label {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #0D9488;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.diag-rec-title {
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #F8FAFC;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.diag-rec-desc {
  color: #94A3B8;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

.diag-rec-services {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.5rem;
}

.diag-rec-tag {
  background: rgba(13,148,136,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,148,136,0.3);
  color: #5EEAD4;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.75rem;
  border-radius: 1rem;
}

/* CTA */
.diag-cta-block {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0F2C2A 0%, #0F172A 100%);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,148,136,0.3);
  border-radius: 1rem;
  padding: 2rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.diag-cta-title {
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #F8FAFC;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.diag-cta-sub {
  color: #94A3B8;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.diag-cta-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1rem;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.diag-cta-primary {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #0D9488;
  color: #fff !important;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  padding: 0.8rem 2rem;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}

.diag-cta-primary:hover {
  background: #0F766E;
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(13,148,136,0.35);
}

.diag-cta-secondary {
  display: inline-block;
  background: transparent;
  color: #94A3B8 !important;
  font-weight: 500;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  padding: 0.8rem 1.5rem;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}

.diag-cta-secondary:hover {
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
  color: #F8FAFC !important;
}

/* START */
.diag-start-section {
  max-width: 700px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem;
}

.diag-start-card {
  background: #1E293B;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  border-radius: 1rem;
  padding: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 3rem 1fr;
  gap: 1rem;
  align-items: start;
}

.diag-start-icon {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  color: #5EEAD4;
}

.diag-start-title {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #F8FAFC;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}

.diag-start-text {
  color: #94A3B8;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.diag-start-btn {
  width: 100%;
  background: #0D9488;
  border: none;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 1rem 2rem;
  border-radius: 0.75rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
}

.diag-start-btn:hover {
  background: #0F766E;
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(13,148,136,0.35);
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .diag-options {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
  .diag-option label {
    flex-direction: row;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    padding: 0.6rem 1rem;
  }
  .diag-opt-icon { font-size: 1rem; }
}

/* ============================================================
   LEAD CAPTURE
   ============================================================ */
.diag-capture {
  display: none;
  max-width: 520px;
  margin: 3rem auto;
  padding: 0 1.5rem 3rem;
}

.diag-capture-card {
  background: #1E293B;
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,148,136,0.3);
  border-radius: 1rem;
  padding: 2.5rem 2rem;
  text-align: center;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.diag-capture-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  height: 3px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0D9488, #5EEAD4);
}

.diag-capture-icon {
  font-size: 2.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  display: block;
}

.diag-capture-title {
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #F8FAFC;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.diag-capture-sub {
  color: #94A3B8;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin-bottom: 1.75rem;
}

.diag-capture-preview {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  background: rgba(13,148,136,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(13,148,136,0.3);
  color: #5EEAD4;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.75rem;
}

.diag-capture-form {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

.diag-capture-input {
  width: 100%;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  color: #F8FAFC;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
  font-family: inherit;
  transition: border-color 0.2s;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

.diag-capture-input::placeholder { color: #475569; }
.diag-capture-input:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: #0D9488;
  background: rgba(13,148,136,0.06);
}

.diag-capture-btn {
  width: 100%;
  background: #0D9488;
  border: none;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 0.85rem 2rem;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  font-family: inherit;
}

.diag-capture-btn:hover {
  background: #0F766E;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(13,148,136,0.3);
}

.diag-capture-skip {
  background: transparent;
  border: none;
  color: #475569;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-family: inherit;
  text-decoration: underline;
  padding: 0;
  transition: color 0.2s;
}
.diag-capture-skip:hover { color: #94A3B8; }

.diag-capture-privacy {
  margin-top: 1rem;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: #334155;
  line-height: 1.5;
}
</style>

<div class="diag-wrapper">

  <!-- HERO -->
  <section class="diag-hero">
    <div class="diag-hero-badge">iMEL® · Diagnóstico gratuito</div>
    <h1>¿En qué nivel está<br><span>su programa?</span></h1>
    <p class="diag-hero-sub">
      Evalúe en 5 minutos la madurez del sistema de medición de impacto
      de su organización y reciba un diagnóstico personalizado con
      el camino a seguir.
    </p>
    <div class="diag-meta">
      <div class="diag-meta-item">
        <span class="diag-meta-icon">⏱</span>
        <span>5 minutos</span>
      </div>
      <div class="diag-meta-item">
        <span class="diag-meta-icon">📊</span>
        <span>15 preguntas · 5 dimensiones</span>
      </div>
      <div class="diag-meta-item">
        <span class="diag-meta-icon">🎯</span>
        <span>Resultado inmediato</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- PROGRESS (hidden initially) -->
  <div class="diag-progress-wrap" id="diagProgress" style="display:none;">
    <div class="diag-progress-inner">
      <div class="diag-progress-label">
        <span class="diag-progress-text" id="progressLabel">Dimensión 1 de 5</span>
        <span class="diag-progress-pct" id="progressPct">0%</span>
      </div>
      <div class="diag-progress-bar">
        <div class="diag-progress-fill" id="progressFill" style="width:0%"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="diag-steps-dots" id="stepsDots"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- START SECTION -->
  <div id="diagStart" class="diag-start-section">
    <div class="diag-start-card">
      <div class="diag-start-icon">🗺</div>
      <div>
        <div class="diag-start-title">5 dimensiones clave</div>
        <div class="diag-start-text">Coherencia programática · Eficacia · Eficiencia · Impacto social · Valoración monetaria</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="diag-start-card">
      <div class="diag-start-icon">📈</div>
      <div>
        <div class="diag-start-title">Semáforo de madurez (N1–N5)</div>
        <div class="diag-start-text">Obtenga su nivel global y el estado de cada dimensión con recomendaciones concretas de siguiente paso.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="diag-start-card">
      <div class="diag-start-icon">🔒</div>
      <div>
        <div class="diag-start-title">Sin registro requerido</div>
        <div class="diag-start-text">El diagnóstico es 100% gratuito y anónimo. Los resultados se generan en su dispositivo.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <button class="diag-start-btn" onclick="startDiag()">
      Iniciar diagnóstico →
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- QUIZ AREA -->
  <div id="diagQuiz" class="diag-quiz-area" style="display:none;"></div>

  <!-- LEAD CAPTURE -->
  <div id="diagCapture" class="diag-capture">
    <div class="diag-capture-card">
      <span class="diag-capture-icon">📬</span>
      <div class="diag-capture-title">Su diagnóstico está listo</div>
      <p class="diag-capture-sub">
        ¿A qué email le enviamos el informe con su nivel de madurez,
        el semáforo por dimensión y la hoja de ruta personalizada?
      </p>
      <div class="diag-capture-preview" id="capturePreviewBadge">
        Calculando su nivel...
      </div>
      <div class="diag-capture-form">
        <input
          type="text"
          id="captureName"
          class="diag-capture-input"
          placeholder="Nombre y organización"
          autocomplete="name">
        <input
          type="email"
          id="captureEmail"
          class="diag-capture-input"
          placeholder="Email corporativo"
          autocomplete="email">
        <button class="diag-capture-btn" onclick="submitCapture()">
          Recibir mi informe →
        </button>
      </div>
      <button class="diag-capture-skip" onclick="skipCapture()">
        Ver resultados sin registrar
      </button>
      <p class="diag-capture-privacy">
        Su información es confidencial. No compartimos datos con terceros.<br>
        Solo recibirá el informe solicitado.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- RESULTS -->
  <div id="diagResults" class="diag-results"></div>

</div>

<script>
// ============================================================
// DATA
// ============================================================

const DIMENSIONS = [
  {
    id: "D1",
    name: "Coherencia programática",
    desc: "Claridad de la teoría del cambio y la cadena causal del programa.",
    icon: "🗺",
    questions: [
      "¿Su programa tiene una Teoría del Cambio documentada con una cadena causal explícita?",
      "¿Los resultados esperados (outcomes) están diferenciados de las actividades y productos (outputs)?",
      "¿Los supuestos clave de la cadena causal están identificados y se monitorean?"
    ]
  },
  {
    id: "D2",
    name: "Eficacia",
    desc: "Capacidad de medir si el programa está logrando los resultados esperados.",
    icon: "🎯",
    questions: [
      "¿Tiene indicadores de resultado (outcomes) definidos para cada grupo de participantes clave?",
      "¿Recolecta datos de seguimiento de manera sistemática y periódica?",
      "¿Compara los resultados con una línea de base o un grupo de comparación?"
    ]
  },
  {
    id: "D3",
    name: "Eficiencia operativa",
    desc: "Gestión de costos y recursos en relación con los resultados alcanzados.",
    icon: "⚙️",
    questions: [
      "¿Tiene registros de costos desagregados por actividad o componente del programa?",
      "¿Calcula el costo por beneficiario o el costo por unidad de resultado?",
      "¿Compara la eficiencia de su programa con referentes o benchmarks del sector?"
    ]
  },
  {
    id: "D4",
    name: "Impacto social",
    desc: "Evidencia de cambio real atribuible a la intervención, más allá del contrafactual.",
    icon: "🌱",
    questions: [
      "¿Ha identificado qué parte del cambio observado es atribuible a su programa (y no a otros factores)?",
      "¿Analiza qué hubiera ocurrido con los beneficiarios sin la intervención de su programa (contrafactual)?",
      "¿Evalúa si los cambios generados persisten en el tiempo después de que el programa termina?"
    ]
  },
  {
    id: "D5",
    name: "Valoración monetaria",
    desc: "Capacidad de traducir el impacto social en valor económico comparable.",
    icon: "💰",
    questions: [
      "¿Traduce alguno de los resultados de su programa a valor económico o monetario?",
      "¿Usa proxies financieros validados (como WELLBY, unit costs o WTP) para cuantificar el valor social?",
      "¿Calcula un retorno social de la inversión (SROI) u otra métrica de costo-beneficio social?"
    ]
  }
];

const OPTIONS = [
  { value: 0, text: "No / Todavía no", icon: "✗", score: "0 pts" },
  { value: 1, text: "En proceso",      icon: "~", score: "1 pt"  },
  { value: 2, text: "Sí, está hecho",  icon: "✓", score: "2 pts" }
];

const LEVELS = [
  { level: "N1", name: "Exploración inicial",      color: "#F87171", min: 0,  max: 9,  desc: "El programa está en sus primeras etapas de sistematización. La prioridad es construir los fundamentos: Teoría del Cambio y un sistema básico de seguimiento." },
  { level: "N2", name: "Sistematización básica",   color: "#FBBF24", min: 10, max: 15, desc: "Existen algunos elementos, pero de manera dispersa. Es el momento de integrarlos en un sistema coherente y comenzar a medir resultados con rigor." },
  { level: "N3", name: "Medición estructurada",    color: "#FCD34D", min: 16, max: 21, desc: "El sistema de medición está activo. El siguiente paso es fortalecer la evidencia causal y comenzar a cuantificar el impacto más allá de los outputs." },
  { level: "N4", name: "Impacto demostrado",       color: "#34D399", min: 22, max: 26, desc: "El programa puede demostrar impacto con evidencia sólida. El paso natural es la valoración monetaria y la comunicación sofisticada a financiadores." },
  { level: "N5", name: "Excelencia evaluativa",    color: "#5EEAD4", min: 27, max: 30, desc: "El programa tiene un sistema de M&E de clase mundial. La frontera es la verificación externa, la publicación de evidencia y convertirse en referente del sector." }
];

const RECOMMENDATIONS = [
  {
    level: "N1",
    title: "Diseño del sistema desde los cimientos",
    desc: "Su programa necesita construir las bases: una Teoría del Cambio documentada, indicadores de resultado y un protocolo mínimo de seguimiento. Sin estos fundamentos, cualquier dato recolectado será difícil de interpretar.",
    services: ["Taller de Teoría del Cambio", "Diseño del sistema de M&E", "Formación en iMEL®"]
  },
  {
    level: "N2",
    title: "Integración y fortalecimiento del seguimiento",
    desc: "Tiene los ingredientes, pero no están conectados. El trabajo es integrar lo que existe en un sistema coherente, definir una línea de base y estructurar la recolección de datos de outcomes.",
    services: ["Evaluación de proceso", "Línea de base", "Banco de indicadores", "Acompañamiento iMEL®"]
  },
  {
    level: "N3",
    title: "Evaluación de impacto con diseño robusto",
    desc: "Es el momento de pasar de medir lo que hace el programa a demostrar lo que cambia. Un diseño cuasi-experimental o experimental le permitirá establecer causalidad con rigor.",
    services: ["Diseño DiD o RCT", "Análisis de atribución", "Análisis costo-eficiencia", "Revisión de literatura"]
  },
  {
    level: "N4",
    title: "Valoración monetaria y comunicación de impacto",
    desc: "Con la evidencia de impacto en la mano, el siguiente paso es traducirlo al lenguaje de los financiadores: SROI, WELLBY u otra métrica de retorno que haga visible el valor generado.",
    services: ["SROI evaluativo", "Análisis WELLBY", "Informe SVI", "Presentación ejecutiva"]
  },
  {
    level: "N5",
    title: "Verificación, publicación y formación de pares",
    desc: "Está en la frontera. El valor ahora está en la verificación externa (SVI Assurance), la diseminación del conocimiento y convertir su experiencia en referente para el sector.",
    services: ["Verificación SVI Assurance", "Publicación de caso", "Formación de equipos", "Benchmarking internacional"]
  }
];

// ============================================================
// STATE
// ============================================================

let currentStep = 0;
let answers = {}; // { "D1_0": 2, "D1_1": 1, ... }

// ============================================================
// RENDER
// ============================================================

function startDiag() {
  document.getElementById('diagStart').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('diagProgress').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('diagQuiz').style.display = 'block';
  currentStep = 0;
  answers = {};
  renderStep();
}

function renderStep() {
  const dim = DIMENSIONS[currentStep];
  const quiz = document.getElementById('diagQuiz');

  // Build questions HTML
  let questionsHtml = '';
  dim.questions.forEach((q, qi) => {
    const key = `${dim.id}_${qi}`;
    const answered = answers[key] !== undefined;
    questionsHtml += `
      <div class="diag-question ${answered ? 'answered' : ''}" id="qcard_${dim.id}_${qi}">
        <div class="diag-q-num">Pregunta ${qi + 1} de 3</div>
        <div class="diag-q-text">${q}</div>
        <div class="diag-options">
          ${OPTIONS.map(opt => `
            <div class="diag-option">
              <input type="radio"
                name="${key}"
                id="${key}_${opt.value}"
                value="${opt.value}"
                ${answers[key] === opt.value ? 'checked' : ''}
                onchange="handleAnswer('${dim.id}', ${qi}, ${opt.value})">
              <label for="${key}_${opt.value}">
                <span class="diag-opt-icon">${opt.icon}</span>
                <span class="diag-opt-text">${opt.text}</span>
                <span class="diag-opt-score">${opt.score}</span>
              </label>
            </div>
          `).join('')}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  });

  const isLast = currentStep === DIMENSIONS.length - 1;

  quiz.innerHTML = `
    <div class="diag-dim-header">
      <div class="diag-dim-tag">${dim.icon} Dimensión ${currentStep + 1} — ${dim.id}</div>
      <div class="diag-dim-title">${dim.name}</div>
      <div class="diag-dim-desc">${dim.desc}</div>
    </div>

    ${questionsHtml}

    <div class="diag-validation" id="diagValidation">
      Por favor, responda todas las preguntas de esta dimensión para continuar.
    </div>

    <div class="diag-nav">
      <button class="diag-btn-back" onclick="goBack()" ${currentStep === 0 ? 'style="visibility:hidden"' : ''}>
        ← Anterior
      </button>
      <button class="diag-btn-next ${isLast ? 'finish' : ''}" id="btnNext" onclick="goNext()">
        ${isLast ? 'Ver mi diagnóstico →' : 'Siguiente dimensión →'}
      </button>
    </div>
  `;

  updateProgress();
}

function handleAnswer(dimId, qi, value) {
  const key = `${dimId}_${qi}`;
  answers[key] = value;
  // Mark card as answered
  const card = document.getElementById(`qcard_${dimId}_${qi}`);
  if (card) card.classList.add('answered');
  // Hide validation
  const v = document.getElementById('diagValidation');
  if (v) v.style.display = 'none';
}

function goNext() {
  const dim = DIMENSIONS[currentStep];
  // Validate all answered
  for (let qi = 0; qi < dim.questions.length; qi++) {
    const key = `${dim.id}_${qi}`;
    if (answers[key] === undefined) {
      document.getElementById('diagValidation').style.display = 'block';
      // Scroll to first unanswered
      document.getElementById(`qcard_${dim.id}_${qi}`).scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
      return;
    }
  }

  if (currentStep < DIMENSIONS.length - 1) {
    currentStep++;
    renderStep();
    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
  } else {
    showResults();
  }
}

function goBack() {
  if (currentStep > 0) {
    currentStep--;
    renderStep();
    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
  }
}

function updateProgress() {
  const pct = Math.round((currentStep / DIMENSIONS.length) * 100);
  document.getElementById('progressFill').style.width = pct + '%';
  document.getElementById('progressPct').textContent = pct + '%';
  document.getElementById('progressLabel').textContent = `Dimensión ${currentStep + 1} de ${DIMENSIONS.length}`;

  // Dots
  let dotsHtml = '';
  DIMENSIONS.forEach((_, i) => {
    let cls = '';
    if (i < currentStep) cls = 'done';
    else if (i === currentStep) cls = 'active';
    dotsHtml += `<div class="diag-dot ${cls}" title="${DIMENSIONS[i].name}"></div>`;
  });
  document.getElementById('stepsDots').innerHTML = dotsHtml;
}

// ============================================================
// RESULTS
// ============================================================

// Store computed results for use after capture
let _cachedDimScores = null;
let _cachedLevel = null;
let _cachedRec = null;

function showResults() {
  document.getElementById('diagQuiz').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('diagProgress').style.display = 'none';

  // Calculate scores
  const dimScores = DIMENSIONS.map(dim => {
    let score = 0;
    dim.questions.forEach((_, qi) => {
      const key = `${dim.id}_${qi}`;
      score += (answers[key] || 0);
    });
    return { id: dim.id, name: dim.name, icon: dim.icon, score, max: dim.questions.length * 2 };
  });

  const totalScore = dimScores.reduce((s, d) => s + d.score, 0);
  const level = LEVELS.find(l => totalScore >= l.min && totalScore <= l.max) || LEVELS[0];
  const rec = RECOMMENDATIONS.find(r => r.level === level.level);

  // Cache for after capture
  _cachedDimScores = dimScores;
  _cachedLevel = level;
  _cachedRec = rec;

  // Show capture form first
  document.getElementById('capturePreviewBadge').textContent = `Su nivel: ${level.level} — ${level.name}`;
  document.getElementById('diagCapture').style.display = 'block';
  window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
}

function submitCapture() {
  const name = document.getElementById('captureName').value.trim();
  const email = document.getElementById('captureEmail').value.trim();

  if (!email) {
    document.getElementById('captureEmail').focus();
    return;
  }

  // Build mailto with results summary
  const level = _cachedLevel;
  const dimScores = _cachedDimScores;
  const dimSummary = dimScores.map(d => `${d.name}: ${d.score}/${d.max}`).join(', ');
  const subject = encodeURIComponent(`Diagnóstico iMEL® — ${level.level} ${level.name}`);
  const body = encodeURIComponent(
    `Nombre: ${name || '(no indicado)'}\n` +
    `Email: ${email}\n\n` +
    `Nivel de madurez: ${level.level} — ${level.name}\n` +
    `Puntaje total: ${dimScores.reduce((s,d) => s+d.score, 0)}/30\n\n` +
    `Detalle por dimensión:\n${dimSummary}\n\n` +
    `Descripción del nivel:\n${level.desc}`
  );

  window.open(`mailto:jmunozm1@eafit.edu.co?cc=${encodeURIComponent(email)}&subject=${subject}&body=${body}`, '_blank');
  renderResults();
}

function skipCapture() {
  renderResults();
}

function renderResults() {
  document.getElementById('diagCapture').style.display = 'none';

  const dimScores = _cachedDimScores;
  const level = _cachedLevel;
  const rec = _cachedRec;
  const totalScore = dimScores.reduce((s, d) => s + d.score, 0);

  // Semáforo cells
  const semHtml = dimScores.map(d => {
    const ratio = d.score / d.max;
    let cls = ratio >= 0.75 ? 'green' : ratio >= 0.5 ? 'yellow' : 'red';
    let icon = cls === 'green' ? '●' : cls === 'yellow' ? '◐' : '○';
    let label = cls === 'green' ? 'Consolidado' : cls === 'yellow' ? 'En progreso' : 'Prioritario';
    return `
      <div class="diag-sem-cell ${cls}">
        <span class="diag-sem-icon">${icon}</span>
        <div class="diag-sem-name">${d.icon} ${d.name}</div>
        <div class="diag-sem-score">${d.score}/${d.max}</div>
        <div class="diag-sem-label">${label}</div>
      </div>
    `;
  }).join('');

  const resultsEl = document.getElementById('diagResults');
  resultsEl.style.display = 'block';
  resultsEl.innerHTML = `
    <div class="diag-results-header">
      <div class="diag-results-badge">✓ Diagnóstico completado</div>
      <h2>Su nivel de madurez de impacto</h2>
      <p class="diag-results-sub">Basado en 15 preguntas en 5 dimensiones del sistema iMEL®</p>
    </div>

    <div class="diag-level-card">
      <div class="diag-level-num" style="color:${level.color}">${level.level}</div>
      <div class="diag-level-name">${level.name}</div>
      <div class="diag-level-desc">${level.desc}</div>
      <div class="diag-score-total">Puntaje total: <strong>${totalScore} / 30 pts</strong></div>
    </div>

    <div class="diag-semaforo">
      <h3>Semáforo de madurez por dimensión</h3>
      <div class="diag-sem-grid">${semHtml}</div>
    </div>

    <div class="diag-rec">
      <div class="diag-rec-label">Recomendación para ${level.level}</div>
      <div class="diag-rec-title">${rec.title}</div>
      <div class="diag-rec-desc">${rec.desc}</div>
      <div class="diag-rec-services">
        ${rec.services.map(s => `<span class="diag-rec-tag">${s}</span>`).join('')}
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="diag-cta-block">
      <div class="diag-cta-title">Convierta este diagnóstico en un plan concreto</div>
      <div class="diag-cta-sub">Agende una sesión gratuita de 30 minutos para revisar sus resultados y diseñar el camino a seguir.</div>
      <div class="diag-cta-actions">
        <a href="herramientas.html" class="diag-cta-primary">Agendar sesión gratuita →</a>
        <a href="metodologia.html" class="diag-cta-secondary">Conocer iMEL®</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="text-align:center; margin-top:2rem; padding-bottom:2rem;">
      <button onclick="restartDiag()" style="background:transparent; border:none; color:#475569; font-size:0.85rem; cursor:pointer; text-decoration:underline;">
        Reiniciar diagnóstico
      </button>
    </div>
  `;

  window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
}

function restartDiag() {
  document.getElementById('diagResults').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('diagResults').innerHTML = '';
  document.getElementById('diagCapture').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('captureName').value = '';
  document.getElementById('captureEmail').value = '';
  document.getElementById('diagStart').style.display = 'block';
  answers = {};
  currentStep = 0;
  _cachedDimScores = null;
  _cachedLevel = null;
  _cachedRec = null;
  window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
}
</script>
```
